---
name: New benchmark
about: Propose a benchmark to add
title: "[benchmark] "
labels: benchmark
---

**The benchmark**
Name, paper, repository, license, and whether the gold answers are public.

**What it measures that nothing here measures**
This is the bar. A sixth arithmetic benchmark adds a number, not a capability.

**Is there an official evaluator?**
If yes, our metric must be parity-tested against it. If no, our metric must be named so that it
cannot be mistaken for one.

**Can the gold be leaked into a prompt?**
Every adapter is checked for this. Say how yours avoids it.
